name: mostEventChannel, mostEventTime, mostEventOrigTime, mostEventTimeNs
title: mostEventChannel, mostEventTime, mostEventOrigTime, mostEventTimeNs
description: long mostEventChannel() returns the channel over which the event arrived.
dword mostEventTime() returns the time stamp of the event (Units: 10 µs).
dword mostEventOrigTime() returns the hardware-generated time stamp of the event (Units: 10 µs).
float mostEventTimeNs() returns the time stamp of the event (Units: 1 ns).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
